# zombs.io Wiki

> Wiki for everything zombs.io

Documentation about zombs.io, a 2D multiplayer survival game. Covers the game engine architecture, gameplay mechanics, buildings, zombies, exploits, bugs, scripting, and community resources.

## Table of Contents

### Introduction

- [Welcome - zombs.io Wiki](https://ayubloom.github.io/zombsWiki/index.md)

### Architecture

#### Engine

- [Engine Overview - zombs.io Wiki](https://ayubloom.github.io/zombsWiki/architecture/engine/overview.md)
- [game - zombs.io Wiki](https://ayubloom.github.io/zombsWiki/architecture/engine/game.md)
